selection_contract.priority_rule: text cards are conditional defaults for text-first jobs only; primary visual proof overrides them

evidence_contract.forbidden_upgrade: No pattern becomes a traffic or performance rule without first-party impressions/entries, matched controls and publication receipts.

patterns.name: 黑底单命题强调字卡

design_contract.first_screen_job: state one legible proposition and mark no more than two semantic stress points
design_contract.density: one proposition; line breaks carry rhythm instead of modules
design_contract.color: dark card plus one accent hue
design_contract.typography: deterministic Chinese typesetting; no generated glyphs
design_contract.thumbnail_check: proposition remains understandable before reading caption

patterns.counterexample: If a real before/after, product texture, face state or system path is the first proof, a text card hides the evidence and lengthens promise-to-proof distance.

patterns.name: 轻纸张问题梗图字卡

design_contract.first_screen_job: make the question legible and let one authorized object or sticker close the emotional tone
design_contract.density: one question plus one supporting visual
design_contract.color: warm paper base plus one accent hue
design_contract.typography: deterministic text with optional outline; no generated glyphs
design_contract.thumbnail_check: question reads without relying on the sticker

patterns.counterexample: A random meme or sticker without rights or information work is decoration, not native evidence.

patterns.name: 荧光便签人话字卡

design_contract.first_screen_job: deliver a spoken-language proposition with one or two local highlights
design_contract.color: light high-energy base plus one marker color
design_contract.typography: deterministic Chinese typesetting; uneven wrapping is allowed
design_contract.thumbnail_check: highlight does not split the sentence into fragments

patterns.counterexample: Handwriting, sticky notes and fluorescent markers are not Xiaohongshu flavor by themselves; a weak proposition remains weak.

patterns.name: 真实主体实拍 + 稀疏标题

design_contract.first_screen_job: let the person, object or scene prove presence before copy explains it
design_contract.density: image dominant; one short label only when needed
design_contract.color: preserve source material; no automatic brand wash
design_contract.typography: copy avoids faces, hands, controls and product evidence

patterns.counterexample: An AI hotel, skin or room image cannot stand in for lived experience; a headline should not cover the proof.

patterns.name: 真实前后结果对照

design_contract.first_screen_job: show the initial problem and result difference at comparable scale
design_contract.density: two evidence fields plus one axis label
design_contract.color: do not recolor one side to manufacture contrast
design_contract.thumbnail_check: the difference is visible without opening

patterns.counterexample: Different lighting, crop, pose or retouching can create a fake result even when both images are real.

patterns.name: 截图 / 文件证据批注

design_contract.first_screen_job: show the exact path, action point or authentic document scope
design_contract.density: one action per frame; crop unrelated chrome
design_contract.color: annotation color has one semantic meaning
design_contract.typography: source text remains readable and unaltered
design_contract.thumbnail_check: viewer can identify the system or document type

patterns.counterexample: A red box that does not identify an action, or a recreated system screen, creates visual certainty without evidence.

patterns.name: 清单 / 表格 / 比较网格

design_contract.first_screen_job: compress scope, axes or decision branches into a saveable map
design_contract.density: cover previews the map; inner pages carry full detail
design_contract.color: color encodes status or grouping only
design_contract.typography: no paragraph-sized cells on the cover
design_contract.thumbnail_check: scope is clear even if item detail is not yet read

patterns.counterexample: Shrinking a corporate slide onto a phone creates modules without an attention path or proof hierarchy.

patterns.name: PLOG / 时间档案拼贴

design_contract.first_screen_job: let several real moments jointly establish a time span, route or lived arc
design_contract.density: every image has a narrative role; collage count is not a target
design_contract.color: preserve authentic variation across dates and scenes
design_contract.typography: copy names the arc instead of labeling every tile

patterns.counterexample: A grid of attractive but unrelated photos signals asset abundance, not a story or result.

patterns.name: 产品 / 质感 / 上手特写

design_contract.first_screen_job: show texture, scale, fit, detail or use relationship before listing claims
design_contract.density: one product relation or one controlled comparison
design_contract.color: retain material color and skin/object context
design_contract.thumbnail_check: texture or use relationship remains visible

patterns.counterexample: A polished packshot can look commercial while proving nothing about texture, fit, use or comparison.

patterns.name: 授权对话 / 明示演绎首帧

design_contract.first_screen_job: show the decisive exchange together with a visible source or fiction label
design_contract.density: one exchange or one turn conflict; the full transcript belongs inside
design_contract.color: do not imitate a real app to manufacture authenticity
design_contract.typography: deterministic text; names, avatars and timestamps require rights or neutral replacement
design_contract.thumbnail_check: viewer can see both the tension and whether it is authorized or dramatized

patterns.counterexample: A fabricated chat UI with realistic avatars and timestamps creates false human evidence even when a disclosure is buried in the caption.

patterns.name: 真实动作过程视频首帧

design_contract.first_screen_job: freeze one legible action that proves the process has begun
design_contract.density: one action and one result contract; editing rhythm stays in the video
design_contract.typography: copy names the action or constraint and avoids covering hands, tools or controls
design_contract.thumbnail_check: the action remains identifiable as a still frame

patterns.counterexample: A polished result thumbnail paired with a process title proves neither the action nor the route used to reach it.

patterns.name: 录屏路径动作首帧

design_contract.first_screen_job: show the current interface, the action point and the promised result in one versioned frame
design_contract.density: one action per frame; unrelated system chrome is cropped
design_contract.color: one annotation color has one action meaning
design_contract.typography: source UI text remains unaltered and readable
design_contract.thumbnail_check: viewer can identify the app or system and the next action

patterns.counterexample: A recreated or outdated interface can look clear while sending users to a path that no longer exists.

patterns.name: 真人口播 / 现场判断首帧

design_contract.first_screen_job: let an authorized person or field context establish who is making which bounded judgment
design_contract.density: one judgment; supporting evidence arrives in the frame or first beat
design_contract.color: preserve the real environment unless a published binding requires a non-deceptive treatment
design_contract.typography: title avoids covering eyes, mouth, hands, badge, product or field evidence
design_contract.thumbnail_check: speaker/context and judgment remain recognizable together

patterns.counterexample: A close-up face plus an unsupported expert-sounding claim creates authority theater rather than evidence.
